echo.echo_scenario.get_s(p, pf=0.93)

Get complex power s

Parameters

  • p – the power (numpy array or scalar)

  • pf – the power factor

Returns

the complex power

echo.echo_scenario.set_zip_total_power(zip_, p, pf=0.93)

Set the total power of a zip (load).

Parameters

  • zip – the zip object

  • p – the total power

  • pf – the power factor
